queries.q: Run RICE and ICE against these 15 roadmap candidates and show me where they disagree
We have a backlog of 20 feature requests; score them and tell me what to build first
Rank these Q3 initiatives with MoSCoW so we can scope the release
Compare our candidate list across RICE, ICE, and weighted scoring; I want to see the consensus and the outliers
Leadership wants a defensible ranking of these eight initiatives before the planning offsite
We surveyed customers on the top pain points; run Kano against these feature candidates now that we have that data
Score this list of technical debt items against business priority, engineering cost, and customer urgency
Two PMs disagree about what ships next quarter; run the numbers so the debate is about assumptions, not opinions
Apply a weighted scoring model across these twelve candidates using our four criteria
Give me an executive summary recommendation after running every applicable framework on this feature list
We have forty raw ideas and no structure yet; connect them back to customer opportunities before we rank anything
queries.notes: No candidate list to rank yet; the tree structures ideas first, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Build the outcome-to-opportunity-to-solution map for our retention goal before we even have a list to score
Here is a messy Slack thread about a production incident; tell me what to do next and how to execute it
queries.notes: A raw situation needing a full action plan, not a defined list to rank

queries.q: I have an executive's rambling notes from a hallway conversation; turn this into the single most important next effort and how to run it
How big is the market opportunity for this new product line? Give me TAM, SAM, and SOM
queries.notes: Sizing a market, not ranking a feature list, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Why does my Kubernetes pod keep getting OOMKilled under normal load?
Write a regex to validate international phone numbers
Recommend a good running route near Golden Gate Park
